saturationShift(float) - Method in class particleengine.ParticleData
 
saturationShift(float, float) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
 
setAlwaysRenderInCampaign(boolean) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
If true, particles will persist between screen transitions (but their positions will not be adjusted).
setAxis(float) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
 
setAxis(Vector2f) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Sets the axes of this emitter's coordinate system.
setBlendMode(int, int, int) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Sets the blend source factor, destination factor, and blending function.
setCampaignLayer(CampaignEngineLayers) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Sets the rendering layer of this emitter.
setInactiveBorder(float) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Sets the "render radius" of the emitter.
setLayer(CombatEngineLayers) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Sets the rendering layer of this emitter.
setLocation(float, float) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Sets this emitter's location.
setLocation(Vector2f) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
 
setSmoothDynamic(boolean) - Method in class particleengine.IEmitter
 
setSprite(SpriteAPI) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Sets the sprite used by this emitter.
setSprite(String) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Sets the sprite used by this emitter.
setSyncSize(boolean) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Sets whether generated particles should always have the same x and y scale.
sinusoidalMotionX(float, float, float, float, float, float) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Adds periodic motion along the emitter's x-axis.

size(float, float) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Sets the size of particles generated by this Emitter.
size(float, float) - Method in class particleengine.ParticleData
 
size(float, float, float, float) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Same as Emitter.size(float, float), but allows specification of x-scale and y-scale separately.
stream(int, float, float) - Method in class particleengine.IEmitter
Generates a continuous stream of particles.

Generates a continuous stream of particles.
